_doc: Reviewer sign-off on cross-artifact entity-ID alignment findings (SC-0018, the analogue of coverage-exceptions.json / lint-exceptions.json). A finding whose keys match an entry here is downgraded by `tripod id-check` from ERROR/MISALIGN/FLAG to ✓ ACCEPTED: it still appears in the inventory (marked accepted, with the reason), but is excluded from the failure count and does not fail the run. It exists for the legitimate cases — e.g. a map that declares an off-stage referent the FOR_MODEL omits (already documented as a coverage difference by `tripod gold-diff`), or a deliberate surface variant — ruled by the project lead, NOT silently suppressed. The engine stays pure (it always surfaces the finding); acceptance is applied as a recorded downgrade, exactly as `tripod coverage` applies coverage-exceptions. Governed: every entry carries provenance (accepted_by/on + sc_ref); pinned in _spec/pins.json, so accepting an exception is a recorded, re-pinned edit. Match keys: pericope = map basename stem (e.g. 'P01-Ruth-1-1-5'); kind ∈ {REFERENCE_INTEGRITY, NAME_BINDING, MISALIGNMENT, FLAG_MISMATCH, DANGLING_NOTE}; then code (entity/flag findings) | note_title (dangling) | (scope, direction) also for MISALIGNMENT/FLAG_MISMATCH. SC-0020 adds the first signed-off entries: the ruled place/time coverage-difference one-siders (off-stage/contextual referents the FOR_MODEL carries structurally but the map declares only contextually, or vice-versa — already-documented MM↔gold coverage differences).

exceptions.note: The covenant land they are returning *to* — referenced, not scene-present in the map's §3B. The FOR_MODEL carries it as a structural place; a legitimate map↔FM coverage difference.

The harvest frame named at the close; FOR_MODEL-structural only. A legitimate map↔FM coverage difference.
The gleaning locus in Boaz's command; FOR_MODEL-structural only. A legitimate map↔FM coverage difference.
The already-documented MM↔gold coverage difference (the P04 95% gold-diff): the map declares PL1, the gold FOR_MODEL omits it.
The already-documented MM↔gold coverage difference (the P04 95% gold-diff): the map declares PL2, the gold FOR_MODEL omits it.
